project_request: Real-time monitoring dashboard for AI model performance with latency, cost, and alerting.

questions.question: What time-series database should we use for metrics storage?
questions.answer: TimescaleDB — we already use PostgreSQL and it supports time-series natively

questions.question: How should metrics be ingested in real-time?
options: Both: HTTP for low volume, queue for high volume
questions.answer: HTTP POST with batching client-side, backed by a Redis queue for burst handling

questions.question: How should aggregation work for longer time ranges?
options: Compute on read from raw data
questions.answer: Continuous aggregates — TimescaleDB handles this natively with minimal config

questions.question: How should alerts be evaluated?
options: Streaming evaluation on each data point
Hybrid: streaming for critical, polling for others
questions.answer: Hybrid: streaming evaluation for critical alerts, 1-minute polling for non-critical
